original_statement: Netherlands does not reach semi-finals (semifinalists: Portugal, Spain, France, Brazil) [Wesley Sneijder, December 2025]
statement_context: Public prediction by former Netherlands international Wesley Sneijder published in Express.co.uk. Clear and specific claim about tournament progression.
resolution_criteria: Netherlands does not appear among the four teams in the FIFA World Cup 2026 semifinals, according to the official FIFA knockout bracket published after the quarterfinals.

original_statement: World Cup 2026 winner is one of: Portugal, Spain, France, Brazil [Wesley Sneijder, December 2025]
statement_context: Public prediction by former Netherlands international Wesley Sneijder published in Express.co.uk. Restricts possible winners to four teams.
resolution_criteria: The winner of the 2026 FIFA World Cup is one of Portugal, Spain, France, or Brazil, as determined by the official FIFA final match result.

original_statement: Netherlands reaches final / strong Oranje performance in Group F and beyond [Süleyman Öztürk, June 2026]
statement_context: Public prediction by Süleyman Öztürk published on Voetbal International. Expects strong Netherlands performance including reaching the final.
resolution_criteria: Netherlands appears in the FIFA World Cup 2026 final match, as determined by the official FIFA final fixture.

original_statement: Portugal wins World Cup 2026 (Netherlands in final) [Süleyman Öztürk, June 2026]
statement_context: Public prediction by Süleyman Öztürk published on Voetbal International. Predicts Portugal as winner with Netherlands as runner-up.
resolution_criteria: Portugal is declared the winner of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA final match result.

original_statement: Netherlands reaches quarter-finals or better [Bas van den Hoven, June 2026]
statement_context: Public prediction by Bas van den Hoven published on Voetbal International. Expects Netherlands to reach at least the quarterfinals.
resolution_criteria: Netherlands reaches at least the quarterfinal stage of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA knockout bracket.

original_statement: Netherlands wins 2026 World Cup, defeats Portugal in final [Joachim Klement, May 2026]
statement_context: Public prediction by German mathematician and forecaster Joachim Klement. Strong claim that Netherlands wins the tournament.
resolution_criteria: Netherlands is declared the winner of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA final match result.

original_statement: Netherlands tops Group F and reaches at least quarter-finals [Joachim Klement, May 2026]
statement_context: Public prediction by Joachim Klement. Expects Netherlands to win Group F and progress deep into the knockout stage.
resolution_criteria: Netherlands finishes first in Group F and reaches at least the quarterfinals of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

original_statement: Netherlands has strong chances in Group F but faces tough knockout path [Finley Crebolder, May 2026]
statement_context: Public prediction by Finley Crebolder from Clockwork Oranje podcast. Balanced view on Netherlands group stage and knockout prospects.
resolution_criteria: Netherlands qualifies from Group F for the knockout stage of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

original_statement: Netherlands aims for quarter-finals or better at 2026 World Cup [Michael Statham, April 2026]
statement_context: Public prediction by Michael Statham (@EredivisieMike) on Football Oranje. Expects Netherlands to reach at least the quarterfinals.
resolution_criteria: Netherlands reaches at least the quarterfinal stage of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

original_statement: Netherlands performs well in Group F but not expected to win tournament [Michael Statham, May 2026]
statement_context: Public prediction by Michael Statham (@EredivisieMike). Expects solid group stage performance but limited overall tournament success.
resolution_criteria: Netherlands does not win the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA final result.
